episode.title: #770: Elizabeth Gilbert — How to Set Strong Boundaries, Overcome Purpose Anxiety, and Find Your Deep Inner Voice
episode.description: Elizabeth Gilbert is the author of Eat, Pray, Love and the host of the Letters from Love newsletter. In this conversation, she discusses self-compassionate ownership of responsibility, two-way prayer, setting boundaries, creativity guidance, and finding comfort in solitude and mortality.
